arts.sum: Napoli boss Antonio Conte drops a huge bombshell regarding Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's future amid interest from Paris Saint-Germain, Liverpool and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Kvaratskhelia demands Napoli exit amid Premier League interest
arts.sum: Kvicha Kvaratskhelia has told Napoli that he wants to leave the club in the January transfer window amid interest from clubs in the Premier League and Paris Saint-Germain. The Georgia international has been the source of much speculation this month, with Chelsea, Liverpool and Manchester United all linked with a move for the unsettled forward. arts.ttl: PSG ready to get creative to seal €100m Duran transfer from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are still holding out on signing Jhon Duran this month despite Aston Villa insisting they will not sell their hot-shot striker for less than €100 million. Villa would only be open to selling Duran for a massive fee and if they can also secure a replacement, with Unai Emery’s side in talks to sign Dortmund forward Donyell Malen .
